chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So we are going to start web development with HTML and more specifically with HTML5

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Now what is HTML?

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If we want to start coding, learn coding, learn programming

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: then HTML is one of the easiest things in the world of coding

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: with which we can start learning coding

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: In fact, in some schools HTML is taught in 7th and 8th class

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So we will start our web development journey from such an easy level

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Let's talk about HTML, its full form is Hyper Text Markup Language

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: This is a language which counts like a markup language

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Markup language means HTML tells us about the structure and formatting of all the things written on a website

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I am looking at a website, then a paragraph will come in it

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: or a button will come, or a heading, or a title

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: or I should see an image there

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: HTML makes all these things for us, explains to a browser

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: that how things should look on a website, how should their formatting be

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: One thing we have to keep in mind, here we are not talking about style, color, font

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Here we are talking about what we will see on a web page and in which formatting

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Now usually HTML is not treated as a hardcore programming language in coding

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Because HTML does not have complex things

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: HTML is very simple and in fact if you teach a child, he will also understand programming very quickly

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: if he starts with HTML

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: First of all, let's talk about what exactly HTML does

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I talk about a normal text, means I have written a simple sentence or paragraph

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: then it can look like this

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: In this way, I have written a lot of things in a normal text

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I have to put formatting on this text

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Formatting means that I want to add bullet points in some things

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I want to write some words in bold, some words in italic, some words I want to underline

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: After this line, I want to start the next bullet points in the next line

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: This is called formatting

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Instead of writing all the information one after the other

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Instead of writing all the information one after the other

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: We present our text or data in a better form

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If this is a normal text, then its formatted form will be something like this

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: In which the line will be written in this way in the beginning

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: After that I have added bullet points

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: After that I have made the word bold

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: And if I look at H2O, which is the molecular formula of water

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: In that too, 2 is small

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If you write it in normal text, then H2 will be as big

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So in this way, what thing is to be presented in which way

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: It makes us HTML

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So we use a normal plain text to convert it into formatted text

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So in a way we can understand that HTML tells our browser

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: That is, Chrome, Safari, Edge

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: It tells all these rules that how to present our plain text

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Now let's talk about a normal Google search page

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I right click on this page, then I have a lot of options

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I have all the options in Mac

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: But if you are using Windows or Linux

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So in that too, if you are on Chrome

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So there you will get an option of a page source

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: And you will get an option of an inspect

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: First of all, I am going to click on the page source

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So what will I know

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I will get all the code of this page written for me

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: And if I notice this

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So here it starts with a doc type HTML

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: That is, this whole thing is an HTML file

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So this is the code of HTML

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Which tells how to present data

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Where is the button coming

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: What is the font of Google

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: How is the photo going to be

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So all these things are told to a browser

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: And HTML again takes out all the information for formatting

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Here if I come back to my Google page

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I right click and click on inspect

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So a window opens for me

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Now after clicking on this arrow here

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I am going to scroll on my page

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: So here I will know that a lot of boxes are being made

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Google is in a single box

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Search is also in a single box

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I talk about this small search, it is also in a box

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: If I talk about these icons, then this is also in a rectangular box

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: I can see all the things

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Why do things appear in these rectangular boxes

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: We are going to read about it in detail

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: When we talk about HTML elements

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: But these are actually small elements

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: From which a whole web page is made

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: And here inside the elements

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: All my HTML code is there

chunks.title: Introduction to HTML
chunks.text: Which tells how this page will look in this formatting due to HTML

text: So we are going to start web development with HTML and more specifically with HTML5 Now what is HTML? If we want to start coding, learn coding, learn programming then HTML is one of the easiest things in the world of coding with which we can start learning coding In fact, in some schools HTML is taught in 7th and 8th class So we will start our web development journey from such an easy level Let's talk about HTML, its full form is Hyper Text Markup Language This is a language which counts like a markup language Markup language means HTML tells us about the structure and formatting of all the things written on a website If I am looking at a website, then a paragraph will come in it or a button will come, or a heading, or a title or I should see an image there HTML makes all these things for us, explains to a browser that how things should look on a website, how should their formatting be One thing we have to keep in mind, here we are not talking about style, color, font Here we are talking about what we will see on a web page and in which formatting Now usually HTML is not treated as a hardcore programming language in coding Because HTML does not have complex things HTML is very simple and in fact if you teach a child, he will also understand programming very quickly if he starts with HTML First of all, let's talk about what exactly HTML does If I talk about a normal text, means I have written a simple sentence or paragraph then it can look like this In this way, I have written a lot of things in a normal text If I have to put formatting on this text Formatting means that I want to add bullet points in some things I want to write some words in bold, some words in italic, some words I want to underline After this line, I want to start the next bullet points in the next line This is called formatting Instead of writing all the information one after the other Instead of writing all the information one after the other We present our text or data in a better form If this is a normal text, then its formatted form will be something like this In which the line will be written in this way in the beginning After that I have added bullet points After that I have made the word bold And if I look at H2O, which is the molecular formula of water In that too, 2 is small If you write it in normal text, then H2 will be as big So in this way, what thing is to be presented in which way It makes us HTML So we use a normal plain text to convert it into formatted text So in a way we can understand that HTML tells our browser That is, Chrome, Safari, Edge It tells all these rules that how to present our plain text Now let's talk about a normal Google search page If I right click on this page, then I have a lot of options I have all the options in Mac But if you are using Windows or Linux So in that too, if you are on Chrome So there you will get an option of a page source And you will get an option of an inspect First of all, I am going to click on the page source So what will I know I will get all the code of this page written for me And if I notice this So here it starts with a doc type HTML That is, this whole thing is an HTML file So this is the code of HTML Which tells how to present data Where is the button coming What is the font of Google How is the photo going to be So all these things are told to a browser And HTML again takes out all the information for formatting Here if I come back to my Google page I right click and click on inspect So a window opens for me Now after clicking on this arrow here I am going to scroll on my page So here I will know that a lot of boxes are being made Google is in a single box Search is also in a single box If I talk about this small search, it is also in a box If I talk about these icons, then this is also in a rectangular box I can see all the things Why do things appear in these rectangular boxes We are going to read about it in detail When we talk about HTML elements But these are actually small elements From which a whole web page is made And here inside the elements All my HTML code is there Which tells how this page will look in this formatting due to HTML
